page_metadata.biotools__summary: Microscopy image browser (MIB) is a software package for high-performance segmentation and image processing of multidimensional datasets that improves and facilitates the full utilization and quantitative analysis of acquired data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Microscopy image browser (MIB) is a software package for high-performance segmentation and image processing of multidimensional datasets that improves and facilitates the full utilization and quantitative analysis of acquired data.
